title: Not Another UI/UX Course -
subtitle: This is not a theory-heavy design course. You’ll learn how real product designers think, solve problems, and ship work that hiring managers actually care about.

testimonials.text: Aakash G. — landed a ₹9.5LPA role as a fresher
Priya S. — doubled her freelance rate within 3 months
Rahul K. — first UI internship at a Bangalore product company
Neha M. — from graphic design to full-time UX in one cohort

videoDescription: See exactly how this course is different — and why 90% of design courses leave you unprepared.
videoQuoteEmphasis: this course turns beginners into job-ready UI/UX designers
videoQuoteSuffix: — without wasting months on outdated theory.
